data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Secure communication channels for private messaging.
data.technical_spec: Uses HTTPS/TLS for data in transit.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Adds an extra layer of security for user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Supports both SMS-based and app-based (e.g., Google Authenticator) 2FA.

data.title: Intrusion Detection System
data.technical_spec: Implements systems like Snort or customized IDS solutions.

data.title: Data Protection Protocols
data.description: Protects user data from breaches and leaks.
data.technical_spec: Regular audits and compliance with GDPR and CCPA.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Routine checks to identify and fix vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Employs automated tools and third-party audits.
